customrecordtype.description: Maps Amazon settlement charge descriptions (e.g., Cost of Advertising, FBA Fees) to NetSuite GL accounts for journal entry creation.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Charge Description
customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon charge description to match (e.g., Cost of Advertising, FBAPerUnitFulfillmentFee, Commission)

customrecordcustomfield.label: GL Account
customrecordcustomfield.description: NetSuite GL account to debit/credit for this charge type

customrecordcustomfield.label: Currency
customrecordcustomfield.description: Optional currency filter. If set, this mapping only applies to settlements in this currency.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Configuration
customrecordcustomfield.description: Optional link to a specific marketplace config. If blank, applies globally.

customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Fallback Account
customrecordcustomfield.description: Fallback GL account when no specific charge mapping is found for this config/currency
